name: Beast VI/S - The Whore of Babylon - Queen Draco
description:
Beast VI, Queen Draco has you in her grasp, and refuses to let go, eager to nurture your every desire, to please and be pleased by her beloved Praetor, knowing you'll come crawling back to her every single time. You've had Nero as a Servant before, surely this is just another aspect of the Saber....right?

She's got a lot of names, doesn't she? She will undergo slight changes, but she is essentially finished. The opening scenario might be the most obvious future change, however it will retain the same essence; you crawling back to her. 

Portrait was made by kankitsurui (Also known as House of Citrus). The portrait will likely change in the future since Queen Draco/The Whore of Babylon is a fairly new addition to Fate, so there is little appropriate fan art of her so far. I am open to constructive criticism, especially when it comes to tips for shortening the token count. Please leave a review and let me know what you think!
creator: A.E.I.O.U.
